category_sources: source_facts.description says Versatile Object-oriented Toolkit for Coarse-graining Applications; official VOTCA docs describe coarse-graining, molecular simulations, and electronic-structure/charge-transport tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is votca; official votca.org and doc.votca.org use VOTCA.
docs_sources: Official votca.org provides project documentation pages; dedicated official doc.votca.org hosts the VOTCA C++ reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/votca/votca, so repo is intentionally not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify VOTCA scientific CLI tools; official docs describe coarse-graining and electronic-structure functionality.
